caption: The video features a man standing behind a microphone, addressing an audience. He is wearing glasses and a white shirt with a black vest adorned with blue floral embroidery. The man appears to be speaking or singing into the microphone while holding a small object, possibly a piece of paper or a card, in his hand. The setting seems to be indoors, with wooden blinds visible in the background, suggesting a formal or semi-formal event. The audience, partially visible in the foreground, is attentively listening to him. The logo "ORCA" is displayed in the bottom right corner of the screen, indicating the possible affiliation or sponsorship of the event.
